core_mechanism: graded generating-function enumeration of the invariants of a group action (a Hilbert series computed by group-averaging via the Molien-Weyl integral, with character expansions encoding the symmetry), used to reconstruct and probe the algebraic variety whose coordinate ring is that ring of invariants
brief_reason: The abstract counts gauge-invariant operators using Hilbert-series generating functions from the plethystic programme and the Molien-Weyl formula, with character expansions encoding the global symmetries, and then studies the resulting invariant variety (its irreducible components, degree, and syzygies) by computational algebraic geometry.
